title: helichrysum obtusifolium var. tephrodes
intro: Helichrysum obtusifolium var. tephrodes, also known as Mountain Everlastin', is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Helichrysum obtusifolium var. tephrodes include reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oil blends, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
